params.name: Gutenberg's Press
params.description:
On Feb 16, 1455 AD, Gutenberg invented the modern printing technique and press.
Gutenberg's invention of the printing press in the 15th century marked a significant breakthrough in printing technology. His method involved casting individual, reusable type pieces using a matrix and hand mold, which allowed for the efficient production of large numbers of movable types by pouring a lead alloy into molds. This innovation enabled the successful printing of about 180 copies of the Gutenberg Bible, …
